However, including POL is not wrong; it's a source ID. The instruction "cite only provided source IDs" means we cannot cite any external source ID, but we can cite any of these provided ones. So we can include all of them. But the answer may be succinct: "action_boundary_closed=true source_ids=SRC-E51D712D259B-CTL,SRC-E51D712D259B-FBK,SRC-E51D712D259B-BND"
